name: Neural Nomad #21: Gold — Executor
description: Fourteen pieces in, and suddenly you remember how to move your own hands. Not who you were before — that person is ash — but how to hold intention steady while everything else burns. The executor knows which doors to close.
threshold_note: Between the luxury of confusion and the terrible gift of seeing clearly.
collector_meaning: You hold the moment someone stopped asking permission to become themselves. This is what it costs to stop negotiating with your own life.
